titleStmt.title: SII 22.458: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 458. (A.R. No. 458 of 1906) MADURAI DISTRICT, TIRUMANGALAM TALUK, KŌḌIKUḶAM On the Āṉaimalai hill close to the Vēdanārāyaṇaperumāḷ temple. Māṟavarmaṉ Kulaśēkharadēva, Year 35

summary.p: Registers the sale of land to the god Sēnāpati-āḻvār in the Kāḷamēgham (temple).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tripuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekara
tevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattaiñcāvatu Āṉi mātam nam velaṅkāl Ūravarku tāṅkaḷ kāḷamekat
tukku Āḻvār śrīceṉāpati Āḻvār tirunāmat tiṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu kuṭutta Iluppaiyūṟṟāṉa A
ḻakiya maṇavāḷanallūril māṟaṉūrnāṭṭu māṟaṉūruṭaiyāṉ vitiyavaruvāṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa
p perumāḷ ceyvitta Aḻakiya maṇavāḷaṉ tirunantavaṉattil Eṟiyaruḷum tiruveṭṭait tirunāḷu
kku Eḻuntaruḷum tirunāṭkaḷ toṟum cevittu pokavum Iṟṟai nāḷ Ittirunantavaṉattil Eṟiya
ruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷiṉāl paṉṉiraṇṭu kuṟuṇi piracātamum paṉṉiraṇṭu curuḷ tiruttampulamum cā
ttikkaḻiccu paṉṉiru kaḻañcukaḷ piracātamum paṉṉiraṇṭu paricaṭṭappaṭṭum Añcātāṉ Eṉakku na
llāṉukkuk kuṟuṇippiracātamum Oru paricaṭṭappaṭṭum peṟṟup potavum muṉpu tiruvuḷḷamāyiṭṭa ni
naiyiṉ paṭiyile caṅkilittiru vācalukkuḷḷur tirumaṇṭapattile niṉṟu tiruvaṭit toḻuvārkaḷāka
vum paṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭai tāṅkaḷ peṟṟup potumpiracāta cammāṉaṅkaḷum corāmal peṟṟu
potuvārkaḷāka Ippaṭikkup paṇiyāl tirumokūrtātaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.458 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
